caption: A presenter stands at the front of a dimly lit room, speaking to a large audience seated in rows of chairs. The room is equipped with several large projection screens and overhead lighting. The audience consists of people dressed in business-casual attire, including button-down shirts and sweaters, facing the front of the room. As the scene progresses, the camera angle shifts slightly, providing a closer view of the attendees' heads and shoulders. In the lower portion of the screen, a graphic overlay appears and persists, containing the text "14 APRIL 2018 · NASHVILLE, TN" and "Trump's Economy: Boom Times or Dangerous Bubble?". The presenter remains stationary behind a podium or table, gesturing while speaking to the crowd, who remain focused on the presentation.
